name: PRODIGY
description: Given a complex protein structure, predict the binding affinity between each pair of chains. Showed 0.73 correlation on protein-protein binding affinity benchmark.
capabilities: Given a complex protein structure, predict the binding affinity between each pair of chains
Showed 0.73 correlation on protein-protein binding affinity benchmark

complex_structure.description: Protein complex structure in PDB or mmCIF format

temperature.description: Temperature in Kelvin for binding affinity calculation
